rag_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they reference component ports
Use AGREE syntax: assume "label": expression;, guarantee "label": expression;, eq name : type = expression;, const name : type = value;, assign output = expression;
Write output range guarantees using visible inputs and outputs
Use AGREE scalar types: int, real, bool
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
generic_rules: Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations for assumptions and guarantees
Align helper declaration types with expression types
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE expressions unless exposed through ports or constants
Use valid AGREE scalar types in declarations
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
Implementation annexes are for implementation-level bindings
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not use AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions
Do not use invalid AGREE scalar type names
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names are not AGREE variables
